prompt: Round 2 첫 task로 MOEF 소스 복구를 진행한다. 현재 MOEF는 config/agencies.json에서 https://www.korea.kr/rss/dept_moef.xml RSS를 사용 중이지만 channel updated 2026-03-18, 최신 item 2026-03-17로 약 3주 stale 상태다. 우선순위는 B (mofe.go.kr 직접 HTML 스크래핑) → A (korea.kr 신규 RSS 슬러그 교체) → C (MOEF disable) 순으로 검증하되, B reachability가 막히면 A로 복구하고 stale 재발 방지를 위한 최소 가드를 추가한다. 다른 agency·DB·web·analyzer/pipeline 구조 변경 금지.
build_command: venv/bin/python -c "from src.pipeline import Pipeline; from src.services.analyzer import HybridAnalyzer; print('OK')"

phases.name: implementation
phases.note: Implementation (MOEF url → dept_mofe.xml + RSS stale guard) was already merged in phase 1 commit bfb6b11. AC1 import smoke, AC2 scope, AC4 targeted fetch (50 items, age 0d) all pass against current HEAD. AC3 diff guard verified against bfb6b11~1..bfb6b11 (exactly the expected -dept_moef.xml/+dept_mofe.xml two-line change).

phases.name: regression-verify
phases.note: All AC pass on current HEAD. AC1 import smoke OK. AC2 MOEF fetch 50 entries, age 0d. AC3 FSC sanity returns empty list (ConnectionReset, no crash — env-only, not regression). AC4 stale guard fires exactly once on dept_moef.xml (20d old) and stays silent on dept_mofe.xml. AC5 scope clean (only tasks/2-moef-source/** touched). regression-report.md updated with phase 3 section.
